title: sterculia chrysodasys
intro: Sterculia chrysodasys, also known as the golden sterculia, is a plant species belonging to the Sterculiaceae family and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Sterculia chrysodasys include its potential to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Sterculia chrysodasys often involve drying and processing the leaves or roots to create teas, infusions, or topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
